---
title: "Python"
toc: false
---

Articles on Python tooling, performance, and data engineering patterns.

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### [Why Switch to Polars from Pandas](polars-vs-pandas.qmd)
**Oct 2025** &nbsp;·&nbsp; Polars · Pandas · Benchmarks

Benchmarking Polars vs Pandas across common DataFrame operations: read, write, construct, pivot, join, and filter. Polars wins across the board — often by 10–30x.

[Read →](polars-vs-pandas.qmd)
:::

::::
